extension.displayName: Codex 会话管理 / Codex Session Manager
extension.description: 按项目管理 VS Code Codex 会话，并可跳转官方 Codex 继续对话。 Project-aware Codex sessions for VS Code with official Codex handoff.

configuration.title: Codex Sessions
Show only current-workspace sessions when the view first loads. Disabled by default so every known workspace is visible.
configuration.showArchivedDefault.descri: Show archived sessions by default so archived conversations remain visible with an Archived badge.
configuration.includeSubagentSessions.de: Include sub-agent sessions in the tree.
configuration.detailTurnFetchMode.descri: How much detail to render in the local details document.
configuration.codexHomeOverride.descript: Optional absolute path that overrides the default CODEX_HOME.
configuration.codexCliPath.description: CLI executable used for app-server access and session actions.
configuration.focusCurrentWorkspaceOnVie: When the view becomes visible, automatically return to the current-workspace filter.
configuration.enableDiskCache.descriptio: Show the last cached session snapshot immediately, then refresh in the background.
